meaning: adj.衷心的,亲切的,精神饱满的,丰盛的,强烈的
examples: The men ate a hearty breakfast.
He gave me a hearty slap on the back.
He nodded his head in hearty agreement.
Hearty northern Chinese prefer noodles, breads, buns and steamed dumplings, called jiaozi and baozi.
This hearty dish is the perfect prelude to a mellow afternoon of kayaking on the bottle-green lake.
